title: Punching Creepers
description: Instead of blowing up, creepers now punch you...
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bErLDk-GJMI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Ever had a creeper or ghast blow up your Minecraft house, or did they blow up your Minecraft farm, taking hours to rebuild? Well, now you can rest easy because instead of blowing up your house, these guys now punch you.

The creeper/ghast explosions can be turned off individually onder gamerules

![Creeps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a58171cc5607bdc6f6552660f5556b436764e833.png)



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
